---
title: "Water, Land, and Grains"
subtitle: ""
date: "Summer 2022"

# ----------------------------
# Metadata
# ----------------------------

location: "California"
country: "United States"
coordinates:
  latitude:
  longitude:

elevation: ""
ecosystem:

fieldwork:
institution: "California Department of Water Resources"
role: "Field Investigator"

themes: [land use]

related-essays: []

related-journeys: []

hero-image:

format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
    title-block-banner: false
---

::: {.journey-page}

::: {.journey-hero}

![satellite of California's landscape](../assets/images/journeys/california/hero.jpg){.journey-hero-image}

:::

---

::: {.journey-story}

（To be continued. This story is still being written. Please check back later for updates.）

![satellite composite of California's landscape](../assets/images/journeys/california/gee-animation.gif){.journey-figure}

:::



:::
